changes.text: Added Log Garage with backup export/import, richer history storage, and CSV reopen support
Expanded Log Analyzer compare mode into a fuller comparison workflow for side-by-side review
Added batch log import and dashboard trend baselines for reviewing multiple sessions over time
Analyzer now surfaces diagnostic issue cards to highlight likely problem areas faster
Calculator now includes Fuel Planner tools like pump calibration, station presets, cost optimization, and trip planning
Trimmed unfinished Settings sections and removed unused persisted options for a cleaner surface
Added a more resilient telemetry pipeline with server-side ingest for client events and error reporting
Expanded automated coverage for settings behavior, compare logic, and CSV viewer parsing
Removed duplicate Log Analyzer imports that could break builds after the feature merges
Dashboard pull-to-refresh now stops cleanly instead of getting stuck showing the refresh banner
Added stronger in-flight refresh guards so a single pull gesture cannot retrigger overlapping refresh cycles
Touch cancel handling now resets pull distance state correctly during interrupted refresh gestures

title: Status Bar Contrast + Smoother Tab Switching

changes.text: Corrected status bar style mapping so light mode uses dark time/battery text and dark mode uses light text
Switched to a hybrid loading strategy: core tabs load eagerly while heavier analysis pages stay lazy
Added idle-time preloading for heavy route chunks to reduce first-switch lag between tabs/screens
Updated Capacitor StatusBar/Keyboard default style config to follow system appearance at startup
Prevented unwanted zoom while typing by enforcing iOS-safe form input sizing and tightening touch zoom handling behavior
Calculator numeric parsing now preserves valid 0 values instead of coercing them into blank fields
Hardened native async listener setup/cleanup paths to avoid duplicate listeners during remounts
Route screens and overlays now lazy-load to reduce initial bundle work and improve startup responsiveness
Mobile menu trigger is now a semantic button for better interaction reliability and accessibility

title: Blend Unit Flexibility + iOS Visual Fixes

changes.text: Blend Calculator now supports independent result units, so you can input tank values in litres but view fill amounts in gallons (or vice versa)
Status bar style mapping corrected so light-theme iOS status text/icons render dark for better readability
Onboarding modal now opens centered on iPhone instead of being anchored to the bottom edge
Keyboard appearance and resize behavior improved to prevent the black overlay/gap effect while typing in calculator fields
App shell now uses dynamic viewport sizing and explicit root background handling for cleaner mobile rendering
Added full safe-area handling for top and bottom insets so mobile nav/content no longer overlap the home indicator
Status bar now syncs to light/dark theme and uses transparent overlay behavior
Applied 16px form control font-size to prevent iOS input auto-zoom on focus
PNG export now opens the native share sheet (Save Image, AirDrop, etc.) on iOS
Calculator now listens for keyboard events and scrolls active fields into view
Dashboard now supports pull-to-refresh gesture with haptic feedback
Configured Capacitor splash screen and status bar plugin settings for branded launch behavior
Enabled momentum/touch scrolling behavior for long scroll containers
Added offline-awareness banner using Capacitor Network (with web fallback)
Onboarding and changelog modals now support drag-down-to-dismiss gesture
Update Log now includes platform filter tabs: All, Web, and iOS
HPFP crash detection now prioritizes high pedal/throttle demand and compares HPFP target vs actual more accurately
Tune health score now penalizes severe HPFP crashes correctly instead of showing inflated "Good" scores
BM3 vs MHD auto-detection improved for BM3 headers like bootmod3/(BM3), Pre-Throttle Boost, and HPFP Target variants
Recent logs now recalculate health scores from saved analyses to avoid stale score values
New Settings > Update Log tab lets you open changelog history anytime after onboarding
Saved blend profiles — store and reload your favourite tank setups
Refuel Planner mode in the Calculator
Estimated octane output shown after every blend calculation
Knock event scatter chart — RPM vs load with severity coloring
LTFT/STFT fuel trim analysis by RPM zone
Multi-log compare overlay in Log Analyzer
Chart annotations — tap to pin notes at any time index
PNG export for any chart view
Auto-detect BM3 vs MHD log format with badge
Tune health score (0–100) per log, shown on Dashboard
Log health timeline chart on Dashboard
Haptic feedback on iOS for calculation results and risk alerts
Station finder link to nearest E85 pump
Full log analyzer with AFR, boost, HPFP, and IAT gauges
Timing correction per-cylinder heatmap
Dashboard redesign with active blend card
E85 blend calculator with precision mode
Dark mode support
iOS app via Capacitor
